2604.08381.title: A GAN and LLM-Driven Data Augmentation Framework for Dynamic Linguistic Pattern Modeling in Chinese Sarcasm Detection
2604.08381.paper_summary: Sarcasm is a rhetorical device that expresses criticism or emphasizes characteristics of certain individuals or situations through exaggeration, irony, or comparison. Existing methods for Chinese sarcasm detection are constrained by limited datasets and high construction costs, and they mainly focus on textual features, overlooking user-specific linguistic patterns that shape how opinions and emotions are expressed. This paper proposes a Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) and Large Language Model (LLM)-driven data augmentation framework to dynamically model users' linguistic patterns for enhanced Chinese sarcasm detection. First, we collect raw data from various topics on Sina Weibo. Then, we train a GAN on these data and apply a GPT-3.5 based data augmentation technique to synthesize an extended sarcastic comment dataset, named SinaSarc. This dataset contains target comments, contextual information, and user historical behavior. Finally, we extend the BERT architecture to incorporate multi-dimensional information, particularly user historical behavior, enabling the model to capture dynamic linguistic patterns and uncover implicit sarcastic cues in comments. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method. Specifically, our model achieves the highest F1-scores on both the non-sarcastic and sarcastic categories, with values of 0.9138 and 0.9151 respectively, which outperforms all existing state-of-the-art (SOTA) approaches. This study presents a novel framework for dynamically modeling users' long-term linguistic patterns in Chinese sarcasm detection, contributing to both dataset construction and methodological advancement in this field.
2604.08381.paper_summary_zh: 諷刺是一種修辭手法，通過誇張、諷刺或比較來表達對某些個體或情境的批評或強調其特徵。現有的中文諷刺檢測方法受到有限數據集和高建設成本的限制，主要集中於文本特徵，忽略了用戶特定的語言模式，這些模式影響了意見和情感的表達。本文提出了一種基於生成對抗網絡（GAN）和大型語言模型（LLM）的數據增強框架，以動態建模用戶的語言模式，以增強中文諷刺檢測。首先，我們從新浪微博收集各種主題的原始數據。然後，我們在這些數據上訓練一個GAN，並應用基於GPT-3.5的數據增強技術來合成一個擴展的諷刺評論數據集，命名為SinaSarc。該數據集包含目標評論、上下文信息和用戶歷史行為。最後，我們擴展BERT架構，以納入多維信息，特別是用戶歷史行為，使模型能夠捕捉動態語言模式並發現評論中的隱含諷刺線索。實驗結果證明了我們提出的方法的有效性。具體而言，我們的模型在非諷刺和諷刺類別上均達到了最高的F1分數，分別為0.9138和0.9151，超越了所有現有的最先進（SOTA）方法。本研究提出了一種新穎的框架，用於動態建模用戶在中文諷刺檢測中的長期語言模式，對該領域的數據集構建和方法論進展作出了貢獻。
2604.08381.author: Wenxian Wang et.al.
2604.08381.authors: Wenxian Wang, Xiaohu Luo, Junfeng Hao, Xiaoming Gu, Xingshu Chen, Zhu Wang, Haizhou Wang
